generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how over-reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring we can defend ourselves when allies might hesitate. The recent cyber-attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to lag behind. Let's invest in our own capabilities while maintaining strong alliances. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
